hero.subtitle: Building digital experiences where engineering precision meets beautiful design for humans and AI.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full-stack engineer | AI Integrator | DevOps Enthusiast
paragraphs: I'm  Hana Romdhani, a software engineer specialized in web and internet technologies, graduated with honors from ESPRIT in January 2026.

Through my academic journey and internships, I developed an engineering mindset that drives me to build scalable architectures, solve problems efficiently, and stay focused on quality — while collaborating closely with teams to reach shared goals.

My standout project is XPlanB — a collaborative document-sharing and well-being platform I took from zero to production during my internship at TSE Consulting. It features real-time collaboration, an AI assistant powered by LLaMA 3.1, productivity analytics, and focus-session tooling, all deployed with a complete DevOps pipeline using React, NestJS, MongoDB, Docker, GitHub Actions, Nginx, and SonarQube.
Currently open to full-time full-stack or software engineering roles where the bar is high and the work is real.

tse.title: Full Stack Engineer Intern / End-of-Studies Project
tse.description: Developed XPLANB, an innovative full-stack platform for secure document sharing, real-time collaboration, productivity management and wellbeing tools (pomodoro session). The application features user authentication, live document co-writing, AI-powered assistance (LLaMA 3.1), video conferencing, and advanced productivity tracking. Created a Bunch Market pitch to validate the business model and market viability.
technologies: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Figma, EditorJS
Git, GitHub, Draw.io, UML, Postman, Trello, Notion
